title: RBI Penalty Orders Against Banks for Compliance Lapses
description: <cite index="23-15,23-16,23-17,23-20">CSB Bank was fined ₹63.60 lakh for non-compliance with directions related to Business Correspondents and customer service standards. Bank of Maharashtra was penalised ₹32.50 lakh for failing to report Self-Help Group member-level data. DCB Bank was fined ₹29.60 lakh for not maintaining the prescribed LTV ratio in non-agricultural gold loan accounts. IIFL Finance was fined ₹5.3 lakh for failing to classify certain restructured accounts as non-performing assets in a timely manner</cite>.
